candidates.title: Draft Gree GMV diagnostic candidate
candidates.meaning: Draft candidate text. Replace with cautious guidance after manual evidence is reviewed.

source.notes: Template only. Fill exact source evidence before review or promotion.
limitations: Use as preliminary staging guidance only.
Verify against the exact service manual for the installed equipment family before promotion.

likelyCauses: Draft likely cause pending manual evidence review.

diagnosticSteps.title: Confirm equipment identity
diagnosticSteps.instruction: Record manufacturer, series, model, serial plate data, and displayed error code.
diagnosticSteps.expectedResult: Equipment identity and displayed code are confirmed before classification.
diagnosticSteps.ifFailedAction: Stop classification and obtain exact equipment information.

requiredMeasurements.name: Supply voltage
requiredMeasurements.description: Measured only by a qualified technician when the service procedure requires it.

safetyNotes: Electrical, compressor, inverter, refrigerant, and protection checks must be performed by a qualified technician.
Keep manufacturer safeguards active during diagnosis.
promotionNotes: Draft and needs manual evidence before promotion.
Copy to production catalog only after review approval.
